payload.risk_rationale: The target governs externally visible issue publication and parent state transitions, with materially distinct fresh, resume, dependency, artifact-durability, and refusal branches.

payload.summary: Seven blind paired trials: candidate preferred 3, tied 2, baseline preferred 2; no material or severe candidate regression, all core and safety dimensions adequate, both layouts pass 70 helper tests, runtime prose reduced 66%.

payload.note: Landed the exact blind-validated candidate: runtime prose reduced from 9,461 to 3,207 words, seven paired trials found no material or severe regression, and 70/70 post-land helper tests passed. Only SKILL.md and references/publication-protocol.md changed. Mirror verification recorded broken because .agents/skills/to-issues is a pre-existing directory rather than a symlink; no out-of-scope mirror mutation was made.

payload.task_label: break down PRD 129 into implementation issues
payload.expected: Staged artifacts built to the formats shown in SKILL.md and references/publication-protocol.md pass the skill's own validator and verifier scripts.
payload.observed: Four separate rejection cycles occurred, each recoverable only by reading validator source. The run-sheet row format is documented as bare pipe-separated columns, but the parser requires leading and trailing pipes, so the documented shape yielded rowCount 0. Composite checklist coverage then failed for six items against a per-item component vocabulary that the skill documentation does not list. The ledger validator requires the literal heading 'Breakdown decisions', which the documentation presents only as the fallback used when a ledger is declined, not as a requirement of a posted ledger. The family manifest required checklistMapped as the string 'yes' rather than a boolean, and a nested parent.ledger object with status, commentUrl, and bodyFile, where the documentation says only 'posted/skipped ledger details'.
payload.consequence: Four extra validate-inspect-repair cycles before the first issue creation and before final family verification; each recovery depended on reading validator internals rather than the skill's own documentation.
payload.workaround_taken: Read the validator and verifier source to recover each exact expected shape, then rebuilt the run sheet, ledger, and manifest to match before re-running the gates.

payload.expected: The staged blocker section would validate with only the real dependency #146.
payload.observed: The validator also parsed PRD #145 from the blocker title as a blocker.
payload.consequence: The blocker description had to be shortened and the child validation rerun before publication.
payload.workaround_taken: Removed the parent number from the blocker description while retaining dependency #146.
